---
title: "Additional Topics"
jupyter: diffeq_py
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
---

This page is a compendium of additional topics for MATH 341 *Differential Equations*.

- [Dimensional Analysis](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/topics_01) this section will cover the basics of dimensional analysis, which is a powerful tool for understanding the behavior of physical systems and for simplifying mathematical models. We will discuss how to identify the dimensions of physical quantities, how to use dimensional analysis to derive relationships between variables, and how to apply these techniques.

- [Bernoulli equations](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/topics_01) discusses **[Bernoulli equations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bernoulli_differential_equation)** as covered in Exercises 14 & 15 in Section 1.4.1 of @lologan2015first.
